channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Chayanne Returns With 2026 Bailemos Otra Vez Tour: See the Dates
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: Welcome to the latest music news. If you're a fan of Latin music, we've got some exciting news for you. Chayanne is hitting the road again with his Bailemos Otra Vez Tour, set to kick off in the US this fall.
[Short music transition]
Host: Produced by Cardenas Marketing Network, the 22-date tour will start on August 28th in Milwaukee and wrap up on October 31st in Orlando. Chayanne will be performing in key cities like Chicago, Atlanta, Houston, Las Vegas, and Miami.
[Short music transition]
Host: The tour takes its name from Chayanne's 2023 album, which debuted at number 3 on the Latin Pop Albums chart and features the hit single "Bailando Bachata", which reached number 1 on the Latin Airplay and Tropical Airplay charts.
[Short music transition]
Host: This isn't Chayanne's first time on the road with this tour. In 2024, he grossed $87.6 million across 63 dates in North and Latin America, and landed at number 29 on the overall Top Tours Year-End 2025 charts. And now, he's bringing it back to the US for what's being billed as his final opportunity to see him perform with his signature passion and excellence.
[Short music transition]
Host: Presale tickets go on sale on April 23rd, and general tickets on April 24th. You can find more information and get your tickets on the official website. Don't miss out on the chance to see Chayanne live in concert.
[Outro music plays]
Host: That's all for today. Thanks for tuning in, and we'll catch you on the next one.
